utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is not a purse ! It is a shoulder bag .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It looks like a women purse .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No Joey , look . Trust me , all the men are wearing them in the spring catalog . Look . See look , men , carrying the bag .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: See look , women , carrying the bag .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Maybe you need sex . I had sex a couple days ago .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! No Joey ! U ... N ... I ... sex .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Well , I ai not gonna say no to that .
